header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would lean more towards 'Confront them directly'. I value honesty and integrity in the workplace, and taking credit for someone else's idea is a form of dishonesty. I would want to address the issue directly with the coworker to ensure it doesn't happen again and to maintain a respectful and honest work environment. However, I would also try to approach the situation calmly and professionally, avoiding any unnecessary tension.
